control_311.controlData: Your Spend Scorecard

control_387.controlData: This metric represents the count of each unique quota period divided by the count of all quota periods. The comparison data shows the difference between the YTD Quota Period for Your Peer Group and Your Company. A detailed view (accessible by clicking Show More) shows the quota period frequency by industry.

control_493.controlData:
This metric represents the ratio of base salary to variable payment. A detailed view (accessible by clicking Show More) shows the average by industry.

Note: Actual Pay Mix is derived from the Payment record and Salary field on the People record in Incent.

control_438.controlData:
This metric represents the sum of the target variable earnings and base pay in the period divided by the total number of unique payees in the period. A detailed view (accessible by clicking Show More) shows the distribution of the average on target earnings, as well as the average over time and by industry.

Note: On target earnings is derived from the Personal Target and Salary fields on the People record in Incent.

control_448.controlData: Annual Target Variable Earnings per Employee

control_449.controlData:
This metric represents the sum of the target variable earnings in the period divided by the total number of unique payees in the period. A detailed view (accessible by clicking Show More) shows the distribution of the average target variable earnings, as well as the average over time and by industry.

Note: Target variable earnings are derived from the Personal Target field on the People record in Incent.

control_450.title: Annual Target Variable Earnings per Employee

control_460.controlData:
This metric represents the sum of the base pay in the year divided by the total number of unique payees in the year. A detailed view (accessible by clicking Show More) shows the distribution of the average base pay, as well as the average over time and by industry.

Note: Base Pay is derived from the Salary field on the People record in Incent.

control_471.controlData: This metric represents the sum of payees in the period divided by the total number of unique plans in the period. A detailed view (accessible by clicking Show More) shows the distribution of the average number of employees per plan, as well as the average over time and by industry.

control_499.controlData: Monthly Actual Variable Earnings per Employee

control_500.controlData: This metric represents the total payment amount in the period divided by the total number of unique payees in the period. A detailed view (accessible by clicking Show More) shows the distribution of the average spend per employee, as well as the average over time and by industry.

control_501.title: Monthly Actual Variable Earnings per Employee

control_510.controlData: Monthly Actual Variable Earnings per Plan

control_511.controlData: This metric represents the total payment amount in the period divided by the total number of unique plans in the period. A detailed view (accessible by clicking Show More) shows the distribution of the average spend per plan, as well as the average over time and by industry.

control_512.title: Monthly Actual Variable Earnings per Plan

control_522.controlData:
This metric represents the sum of the variable payment and base pay in the period divided by the total number of unique payees in the period. A detailed view (accessible by clicking Show More) shows the distribution of the average Total Compensation, as well as the average over time and by industry.

Note: Total Compensation is derived from the Payment Amount and Salary field on the People record in Incent.
